title: Homepage Auditions: add Food/Training/Scary Vibes block

requirements.summary: Add a clearly separated Food/Training/Scary Vibes highlight block within the homepage Auditions section, styled consistently with existing Auditions card/badge accents.
acceptanceCriteria: On the homepage, within the Auditions section content, a new block is visible that presents Food, Training, and Scary Vibes as three distinct items (e.g., three mini-cards, a 3-column grid on desktop / stacked on mobile, or equivalent).
The new block uses existing site typography/colors and matches the current horror theme (e.g., accent backgrounds, destructive border accents) without introducing a new unrelated theme.
All user-facing text in the new block is in English.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable Auditions subcomponent that renders three distinct items (Food, Training, Scary Vibes) using the existing shadcn-ui Card/Badge styling patterns and the current horror theme classes (e.g., bg-accent, border-destructive variants). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Compose the new AuditionPerksBlock into the existing Auditions card content (within the Auditions section), ensuring it is clearly separated (spacing/divider) and visually consistent with existing badges/cards/accents. Use existing shadcn-ui components already imported/used (e.g., Card, Badge) rather than modifying any files under frontend/src/components/ui. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Keep the existing audition date range and hours unchanged while integrating the new layout block, without breaking or removing current Auditions content.
acceptanceCriteria: The Auditions section still displays "February 7th – March 2nd, 2026" as the audition dates.
The Auditions section still displays "10:00 AM – 9:00 PM" as the audition hours.
No other existing Auditions content (roles list, headings) is removed or broken by the layout change.

file_operations.description: Refactor only around the insertion point for the new block while preserving the exact date and hours strings currently rendered ("February 7th – March 2nd, 2026" and "10:00 AM – 9:00 PM") and keeping the roles list/headings intact.
